name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Check Into Cash offers payday loans up to $600, title loans, and financial services with same-day funding at physical locations and online in Michigan and other states.
description_long:
Check Into Cash is an established short-term lending company that has operated for 30 years, providing emergency cash solutions to consumers facing unexpected expenses. The company operates a network of physical retail locations, including their Ferndale, Michigan branch at 749 East 9 Mile Road, alongside online lending options. Their primary business model centers on rapid-access, small-dollar loans designed to bridge gaps between paychecks or handle urgent financial needs.

The company offers multiple loan products tailored to different borrowing needs: payday loans (up to $600), installment loans with longer terms and lower payments, title loans using vehicle collateral, and a Flex Line of Credit for repeated borrowing within an established limit. Beyond lending, Check Into Cash provides ancillary financial services including check cashing (accepting checks others may refuse), Western Union money transfers, bill payment processing, Green Dot Visa debit card accounts, and tax preparation services. Their application process requires minimal documentation: government-issued ID, Social Security number, proof of active checking account, and proof of income.

Check Into Cash distinguishes itself through its physical retail presence, enabling customers to walk out with cash same-day upon approval, and its willingness to cash checks that competitors reject. The company emphasizes speed and accessibility, operating extended hours (8am-7pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturdays) and positioning itself as a stress-relief solution for community members facing financial emergencies. Their 30-year operational history and multi-state licensing suggest established infrastructure and regulatory compliance.

However, the company operates in the high-cost lending space with inherent limitations and concerns. Website content deliberately omits specific APR, fee schedules, and interest rate information on main pages, requiring customers to request details or visit state-specific pages—a common practice in predatory lending that obscures true borrowing costs. Payday loans and title loans are inherently short-term, high-cost solutions that can trap borrowers in debt cycles. Customers should approach these products as genuine emergencies only, verify all fees beforehand, and explore payday alternative programs or credit counseling before borrowing.
address: 21083 N John Wayne Pkwy Ste C102, Maricopa, AZ 85139

company_info.headquarters: 21083 N John Wayne Pkwy Ste C102, Maricopa, AZ 85139

pros: Same-day cash availability upon approval for in-store applicants
Accepts customers with bad or no credit history
Willingness to cash checks that other businesses refuse
Extended operating hours including Friday 8am-7pm and Saturday 9am-4pm availability
Multiple loan types available (payday, installment, title, Flex Line of Credit)
30 years of operational history and established physical locations
Additional financial services (Western Union, bill pay, tax prep, debit cards)
cons: APR and fee information not transparently displayed on main website pages; customers must request details or navigate to state-specific pages
Payday and title loans are inherently high-cost products that often trap borrowers in debt cycles requiring repeated borrowing
Maximum payday loan amount of $600 is very small and may not cover substantial emergencies
Title loans require putting vehicle at risk as collateral, creating hardship if repayment fails
No mention of financial counseling, debt management education, or payday alternative programs despite 30-year history
best_for: Employed individuals with bad credit facing small, urgent expenses who can repay within weeks
People without access to traditional bank credit who need same-day physical cash disbursement
Workers needing check cashing services at locations that reject their paychecks
Borrowers willing to use car title as collateral for larger cash needs beyond payday loan limits
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is appropriate for employed individuals with poor credit facing genuine short-term emergencies (car repair, medical bill, utility shutoff) who can repay within 2-4 weeks and have verified income. The critical caveat: these are high-cost loans that should never be used for non-emergency expenses or budgeting shortfalls, and borrowers must obtain complete fee/APR disclosure before applying, as rates are deliberately obscured on the main website.
services: Installment loans with extended repayment terms
Flex Line of Credit for repeated borrowing
Check cashing including checks competitors refuse
Green Dot Visa debit card accounts
